reviews.review_title: A FUN AND IMMERSIVE VR RACING GAME!
reviews.review_description:
Speedway Race Clash doesn't try to compete with realistic racing simulations, and that's precisely its strength.
Here, everything is designed for immediate VR enjoyment.
The driving is intuitive; you're instantly immersed in the action, with a real sense of being in the cockpit.
The first-person view works very well in VR.
The tracks, the speed effects, and the overall atmosphere provide a great experience. It perfectly fulfills its purpose: to have fun in VR without any hassle.

Speedway Race Clash: Ultimate Showdown is a VR racing game with solid potential and a really well-thought-out progression system.

You start with the vintage car collection and work your way up by finishing in the top 3 to earn money. This lets you unlock faster vintage cars, new races, and gradually build your skills. As you improve, you unlock modern cars and their dedicated tracks, and eventually step into the Formula 1 category. The sense of progression feels natural and rewarding.

Driving sensations are good, the races are fun, and unlocking each new tier genuinely feels earned. Overall, it’s a fun, well-executed VR racing experience that keeps you motivated to improve and push further. 🚗💨

developer_response.body:
Hi metaquesta99!
Thank you so much for the thoughtful review,  we really appreciate it. We’re glad to hear the progression system and the sense of unlocking new cars and categories felt rewarding for you. 
It means a lot to know the driving sensations and race flow worked well for you. We’re continuing to refine and expand the game, and feedback like yours helps guide the next steps.
Thanks again for taking the time to share your experience and for supporting the game.

reviews.review_description: This game don't has hand tracking I can't stare with my hands that sucks I understand the  stick and everything but I'm not really into the analog stick The game will be better if I can drive with my hands instead of a joystick I don't like driving like that and you're the graphical overhaul when it comes to the stages in levels they talk they talk like you can drive with your hands but you can't when you end up reading that you got to use the animals stick to stare that sucks that may mean you look good but playing a game kind of sucks it's not what I thought

developer_response.body:
Hi midnight27123, and thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. I understand your frustration, driving with the joystick wasn’t the most immersive option, and many players felt the same.
I wanted to let you know that as of the latest update (released yesterday), the game now supports full VR steering. You can grab the steering wheel with your hands and drive naturally using the controllers, exactly as you described.
I hope you’ll give it another try with the new update. We’ve been working hard to make the experience more immersive. 
Thanks again for your feedback, it helps us to improve the experience for everyone.
